tagline: Tell us what you love — we'll serve you anime you'll love.

form.heading: What do you love?
form.subheading: Pick a few genres and themes, and we'll do the rest.
form.favoritesHint: Add a few you already love and we'll find more like them.
form.needGenre: Pick at least one genre or theme to continue.

results.heading: Your omakase
results.empty: No matches yet — try a different mix of genres.
results.notEnough: Just a few matches this time — here's what we found.

state.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

how.label: How it works
how.lead: No account, no noise — three steps from your taste to a shortlist worth watching.

step1.title: Tell us your taste
step1.body: Pick the genres and themes you love and add a few favorite titles. Nothing is saved — it stays on your screen.

step2.title: We score the catalog
step2.body: We rank thousands of titles by how well they fit you — genre overlap, your favorites, and popularity. Transparent, not a black box.

step3.title: Get your omakase
step3.body: Your matches arrive grouped from Chef's pick to Worth a try. Tweak your taste and run it again anytime.

featured.label: From the catalog
featured.lead: A glimpse of the cover art waiting inside.

footer.note: Anime data via the public Jikan API · a spec-driven prototype
